name: BRUDER ZONA T MICROCERVECERIA, Bogota - Chapinero
snippet: This place makes great beer. They have everything from IPAs to fruity wheat beers. The arepas are delicious and the grilled meats are too.

snippet: Pros: Variety, Friendly staff, Delicious food. Cons: May take long to receive order. , Very tasty natural (lentils/veggie) vegan burgers.
